# True positive samples — these MUST be detected by secret-scan.sh
AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKL
ghp_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefgh1234
xoxb-123456789012-1234567890123-abcDEFghiJKL
password = "supersecretpassword123"
secret: "my_very_secret_value_here"
api_key = "abcdefgh12345678secretkey"
api-key: "long_enough_api_key_value"
